article_title: Bylaw 14758 — Housing Agreement (7786 and 7792 6th St) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Locks 174-Unit Non-Market Rental Development at 6th Street Under Housing Agreement
briefs.summary: Burnaby adopted Bylaw 14758 on August 26, 2025, authorising a housing agreement with Metro Vancouver Housing Corporation for a 174-unit non-market rental building at 7786–7792 6th Street, with rent and tenant eligibility restrictions registered on title.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14758 — Housing Agreement (7786 and 7792 6th St) Bylaw 2025
